ActivateMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to activate a message template

AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResource.description: Grants permission to configure vended log delivery for an assistant

CreateAIAgent.description: Grants permission to create an ai agent

CreateAIAgentVersion.description: Grants permission to create an ai agent version

CreateAIGuardrail.description: Grants permission to create an ai guardrail

CreateAIGuardrailVersion.description: Grants permission to create an ai guardrail version

CreateAIPrompt.description: Grants permission to create an ai prompt

CreateAIPromptVersion.description: Grants permission to create an ai prompt version

CreateAssistant.description: Grants permission to create an assistant

CreateAssistantAssociation.description: Grants permission to create an association between an assistant and another resource

CreateContentAssociation.description: Grants permission to create a content association

CreateKnowledgeBase.description: Grants permission to create a knowledge base

CreateMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a message template

CreateMessageTemplateAttachment.description: Grants permission to create an attachment to a message template

CreateMessageTemplateVersion.description: Grants permission to create a version of a message template

CreateQuickResponse.description: Grants permission to create quick response

CreateSession.description: Grants permission to create a session

DeactivateMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to deactivate a message template

DeleteAIAgent.description: Grants permission to delete an ai agent

DeleteAIAgentVersion.description: Grants permission to delete an ai agent version

DeleteAIGuardrail.description: Grants permission to delete an ai guardrail

DeleteAIGuardrailVersion.description: Grants permission to delete an ai guardrail version

DeleteAIPrompt.description: Grants permission to delete an ai prompt

DeleteAIPromptVersion.description: Grants permission to delete an ai prompt version

DeleteAssistant.description: Grants permission to delete an assistant

DeleteAssistantAssociation.description: Grants permission to delete an assistant association

DeleteContentAssociation.description: Grants permission to delete a content association

DeleteImportJob.description: Grants permission to delete a import job of a knowledge base

DeleteKnowledgeBase.description: Grants permission to delete a knowledge base

DeleteMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete a message template

DeleteMessageTemplateAttachment.description: Grants permission to delete an attachment from a message template

DeleteQuickResponse.description: Grants permission to delete quick response

GetAIAgent.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an ai agent

GetAIGuardrail.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an ai guardrail

GetAIPrompt.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an ai prompt

GetAssistant.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an assistant

GetAssistantAssociation.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an assistant association

GetContent.description: Grants permission to retrieve content, including a pre-signed URL to download the content

GetContentAssociation.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a content association

GetContentSummary.description: Grants permission to retrieve summary information about the content

GetImportJob.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the import job

GetKnowledgeBase.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the knowledge base

GetMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to retrieve a message template

GetNextMessage.description: Grants permission to retrieve for next message in a session

GetRecommendations.description: Grants permission to retrieve recommendations for the specified session

GetSession.description: Grants permission to retrieve information for a specified session

ListAIAgentVersions.description: Grants permission to list information about ai agent versions

ListAIAgents.description: Grants permission to list information about ai agents

ListAIGuardrailVersions.description: Grants permission to list information about ai guardrail versions

ListAIGuardrails.description: Grants permission to list information about ai guardrails

ListAIPromptVersions.description: Grants permission to list information about ai prompt versions

ListAIPrompts.description: Grants permission to list information about ai prompts

ListAssistantAssociations.description: Grants permission to list information about assistant associations

ListAssistants.description: Grants permission to list information about assistants

ListContentAssociations.description: Grants permission to list information about content associations

ListContents.description: Grants permission to list the content with a knowledge base

ListImportJobs.description: Grants permission to list information about knowledge bases

ListKnowledgeBases.description: Grants permission to list information about knowledge bases

ListMessageTemplateVersions.description: Grants permission to list message template versions for the specified message template

ListMessageTemplates.description: Grants permission to list the message templates for a knowledge base

ListMessages.description: Grants permission to list messages in a session

ListQuickResponses.description: Grants permission to list the quick response with a knowledge base

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for the specified resource

NotifyRecommendationsReceived.description: Grants permission to remove the specified recommendations from the specified assistant's queue of newly available recommendations

QueryAssistant.description: Grants permission to perform a manual search against the specified assistant

RemoveAssistantAIAgent.description: Grants permission to remove an ai agent from an assistant

RemoveKnowledgeBaseTemplateUri.description: Grants permission to remove a URI template from a knowledge base

RenderMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to render a message template

Retrieve.description: Grants permission to retrieve knowledge content from specified assistant associations

SearchContent.description: Grants permission to search for content referencing a specified knowledge base. Can be used to get a specific content resource by its name

SearchMessageTemplates.description: Grants permission to search for message templates referencing a specified knowledge base

SearchQuickResponses.description: Grants permission to search for quick response referencing a specified knowledge base

SearchSessions.description: Grants permission to search for sessions referencing a specified assistant. Can be used to et a specific session resource by its name

SendMessage.description: Grants permission to send a message

StartContentUpload.description: Grants permission to get a URL to upload content to a knowledge base

StartImportJob.description: Grants permission to create multiple quick responses

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add the specified tags to the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the specified tags from the specified resource

UpdateAIAgent.description: Grants permission to update information about an ai agent

UpdateAIGuardrail.description: Grants permission to update information about an ai guardrail

UpdateAIPrompt.description: Grants permission to update information about an ai prompt

UpdateAssistantAIAgent.description: Grants permission to update assistant information about an ai agent

UpdateContent.description: Grants permission to update information about the content

UpdateKnowledgeBaseTemplateUri.description: Grants permission to update the template URI of a knowledge base

UpdateMessageTemplate.description: Grants permission to update content of the message template

UpdateMessageTemplateMetadata.description: Grants permission to update metadata of the message template

UpdateQuickResponse.description: Grants permission to update information or content of the quick response

UpdateSession.description: Grants permission to update a session

UpdateSessionData.description: Grants permission to update data stored in a session

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

wisdom:MessageTemplate/RoutingProfileArn.description: Filters access by the connect routing profile arns associated with the resource

wisdom:SearchFilter/Qualifier.description: Filters access by the qualifiers that are passed in the request

wisdom:SearchFilter/RoutingProfileArn.description: Filters access by the connect routing profile arn that is passed in the request
